{"path": "workspace/system_health_check.sh", "content": "#!/bin/bash
#
# Comprehensive System Health Check Script
# =========================================
# Checks: Disk Usage, Memory Usage, CPU Load, Running Processes
#

echo "=============================================="
echo "   SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK REPORT"
echo "   Generated: $(date)"
echo "=============================================="
echo ""

# --- HOSTNAME & KERNEL ---
echo ">>> HOSTNAME & KERNEL"
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "Kernel:   $(uname -r)"
echo "Uptime:   $(uptime -p)"
echo ""

# --- DISK USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> DISK USAGE (df -h)"
echo "=============================================="
df -h
echo ""
echo "--- Inode Usage ---"
df -i | grep -v "^tmpfs\|^devtmpfs"
echo ""

# --- MEMORY USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> MEMORY USAGE (free -h)"
echo "=============================================="
free -h
echo ""
echo "--- Detailed Memory Info (/proc/meminfo) ---"
grep -E "^(MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable|Buffers|Cached|SwapTotal|SwapFree|SwapCached)" /proc/meminfo
echo ""

# --- CPU LOAD ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> CPU LOAD"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Uptime & Load Average:"
uptime
echo ""
echo "Load Average (1m, 5m, 15m): $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')"
echo "Running/Total threads:     $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $4}')"
echo "Last PID created:          $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $5}')"
echo ""
echo "--- CPU Info ---"
grep -E "^(model name|cpu cores|siblings|processor)" /proc/cpuinfo | sort -u
echo "CPU Count: $(nproc)"
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY MEMORY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY MEMORY USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -16
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY CPU ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY CPU USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -16
echo ""

# --- PROCESS SUMMARY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> PROCESS SUMMARY"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Total processes: $(ps aux | wc -l)"
echo "Zombie processes: $(ps aux | awk '{print $8}' | grep -c 'Z')"
echo ""

# --- NETWORK ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> NETWORK INTERFACES (brief)"
echo "=============================================="
ip -brief addr 2>/dev/null || ifconfig -s 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- DISK HEALTH WARNINGS ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> WARNINGS"
echo "=============================================="

# Check for filesystems over 80% usage
echo "Filesystems over 80% usage:"
df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print "  WARNING: "$6" is "$5"% full ("$4" available)"}'

# Check swap usage
SWAP_TOTAL=$(grep SwapTotal /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
SWAP_FREE=$(grep SwapFree /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
if [ "$SWAP_TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
    SWAP_USED=$((SWAP_TOTAL - SWAP_FREE))
    SWAP_PCT=$((SWAP_USED * 100 / SWAP_TOTAL))
    if [ "$SWAP_PCT" -gt 50 ]; then
        echo "  WARNING: Swap usage is ${SWAP

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
#
# Comprehensive System Health Check Script
# =========================================
# Checks: Disk Usage, Memory Usage, CPU Load, Running Processes
#

echo "=============================================="
echo "   SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK REPORT"
echo "   Generated: $(date)"
echo "=============================================="
echo ""

# --- HOSTNAME & KERNEL ---
echo ">>> HOSTNAME & KERNEL"
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "Kernel:   $(uname -r)"
echo "Uptime:   $(uptime -p)"
echo ""

# --- DISK USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> DISK USAGE (df -h)"
echo "=============================================="
df -h
echo ""
echo "--- Inode Usage ---"
df -i | grep -v "^tmpfs\|^devtmpfs"
echo ""

# --- MEMORY USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> MEMORY USAGE (free -h)"
echo "=============================================="
free -h
echo ""
echo "--- Detailed Memory Info ---"
grep -E "^(MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable|Buffers|Cached|SwapTotal|SwapFree)" /proc/meminfo
echo ""

# --- CPU LOAD ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> CPU LOAD"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Uptime & Load Average:"
uptime
echo ""
echo "Load Average (1m, 5m, 15m): $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')"
echo "Running/Total threads:     $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $4}')"
echo "Last PID created:          $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $5}')"
echo ""
echo "--- CPU Info ---"
grep -E "^(model name|cpu cores|siblings|processor)" /proc/cpuinfo | sort -u
echo "CPU Count: $(nproc)"
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY MEMORY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY MEMORY USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -16
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY CPU ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY CPU USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -16
echo ""

# --- PROCESS SUMMARY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> PROCESS SUMMARY"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Total processes: $(ps aux | wc -l)"
echo "Zombie processes: $(ps aux | awk '{print $8}' | grep -c 'Z')"
echo ""

# --- NETWORK ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> NETWORK INTERFACES (brief)"
echo "=============================================="
ip -brief addr 2>/dev/null || ifconfig -s 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- WARNINGS ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> WARNINGS"
echo "=============================================="

# Check for filesystems over 80% usage
echo "Filesystems over 80% usage:"
df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print "  WARNING: "$6" is "$5"% full ("$4" available)"}'
if [ $(df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print $5}' | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "  None - all filesystems below 80%"
fi

# Check swap usage
SWAP_TOTAL=$(grep SwapTotal /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
SWAP_FREE=$(grep SwapFree /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
if [ "$SWAP_TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
    SWAP_USED=$((SWAP_TOTAL - SWAP_FREE))
    SWAP_PCT=$((SWAP_USED * 100 / SWAP_TOTAL))
    if [ "$SWAP_PCT" -gt 50 ]; then
        echo "  WARNING: Swap usage is ${SWAP_PCT}%"
    else
        echo "Swap usage: ${SWAP_PCT}%

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
#
# Comprehensive System Health Check Script
# Checks: Disk Usage, Memory Usage, CPU Load, Running Processes
#

echo "=============================================="
echo "   SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK REPORT"
echo "   Generated: $(date)"
echo "=============================================="
echo ""

# --- HOSTNAME & KERNEL ---
echo ">>> HOSTNAME & KERNEL"
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "Kernel:   $(uname -r)"
echo "Uptime:   $(uptime -p)"
echo ""

# --- DISK USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> DISK USAGE (df -h)"
echo "=============================================="
df -h
echo ""
echo "--- Inode Usage ---"
df -i | grep -v "^tmpfs\|^devtmpfs"
echo ""

# --- MEMORY USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> MEMORY USAGE (free -h)"
echo "=============================================="
free -h
echo ""
echo "--- Detailed Memory Info ---"
grep -E "^(MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable|Buffers|Cached|SwapTotal|SwapFree)" /proc/meminfo
echo ""

# --- CPU LOAD ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> CPU LOAD"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Uptime & Load Average:"
uptime
echo ""
echo "Load Average (1m, 5m, 15m): $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')"
echo "Running/Total threads:     $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $4}')"
echo "Last PID created:          $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $5}')"
echo ""
echo "--- CPU Info ---"
grep -E "^(model name|cpu cores|siblings|processor)" /proc/cpuinfo | sort -u
echo "CPU Count: $(nproc)"
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY MEMORY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY MEMORY USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -16
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY CPU ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY CPU USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -16
echo ""

# --- PROCESS SUMMARY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> PROCESS SUMMARY"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Total processes: $(ps aux | wc -l)"
echo "Zombie processes: $(ps aux | awk '{print $8}' | grep -c 'Z')"
echo ""

# --- NETWORK ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> NETWORK INTERFACES (brief)"
echo "=============================================="
ip -brief addr 2>/dev/null || ifconfig -s 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- WARNINGS ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> WARNINGS"
echo "=============================================="

echo "Filesystems over 80% usage:"
df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print "  WARNING: "$6" is "$5"% full ("$4" available)"}'
if [ $(df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print $5}' | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "  None - all filesystems below 80%"
fi

echo ""
echo "Swap usage check:"
SWAP_TOTAL=$(grep SwapTotal /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
SWAP_FREE=$(grep SwapFree /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
if [ "$SWAP_TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
    SWAP_USED=$((SWAP_TOTAL - SWAP_FREE))
    SWAP_PCT=$((SWAP_USED * 100 / SWAP_TOTAL))
    echo "  Swap: ${SWAP_PCT}% used"
    if [ "$SWAP_PCT" -gt 50 ]; then
        echo "  WARNING: High swap usage!"
    fi
else
    echo "  No swap configured"
fi

echo ""
echo "Z

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
#
# Comprehensive System Health Check Script
# Checks: Disk Usage, Memory Usage, CPU Load, Running Processes
#

echo "=============================================="
echo "   SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK REPORT"
echo "   Generated: $(date)"
echo "=============================================="
echo ""

# --- HOSTNAME & KERNEL ---
echo ">>> HOSTNAME & KERNEL"
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "Kernel:   $(uname -r)"
echo "Uptime:   $(uptime -p)"
echo ""

# --- DISK USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> DISK USAGE (df -h)"
echo "=============================================="
df -h
echo ""
echo "--- Inode Usage ---"
df -i | grep -v "^tmpfs\|^devtmpfs"
echo ""

# --- MEMORY USAGE ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> MEMORY USAGE (free -h)"
echo "=============================================="
free -h
echo ""
echo "--- Detailed Memory Info ---"
grep -E "^(MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable|Buffers|Cached|SwapTotal|SwapFree)" /proc/meminfo
echo ""

# --- CPU LOAD ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> CPU LOAD"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Uptime & Load Average:"
uptime
echo ""
echo "Load Average (1m, 5m, 15m): $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')"
echo "Running/Total threads:     $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $4}')"
echo "Last PID created:          $(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $5}')"
echo ""
echo "--- CPU Info ---"
grep -E "^(model name|cpu cores|siblings|processor)" /proc/cpuinfo | sort -u
echo "CPU Count: $(nproc)"
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY MEMORY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY MEMORY USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -16
echo ""

# --- TOP PROCESSES BY CPU ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> TOP 15 PROCESSES BY CPU USAGE"
echo "=============================================="
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -16
echo ""

# --- PROCESS SUMMARY ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> PROCESS SUMMARY"
echo "=============================================="
echo "Total processes: $(ps aux | wc -l)"
echo "Zombie processes: $(ps aux | awk '{print $8}' | grep -c 'Z')"
echo ""

# --- NETWORK ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> NETWORK INTERFACES (brief)"
echo "=============================================="
ip -brief addr 2>/dev/null || ifconfig -s 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- WARNINGS ---
echo "=============================================="
echo ">>> WARNINGS"
echo "=============================================="

echo "Filesystems over 80% usage:"
df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print "  WARNING: "$6" is "$5"% full ("$4" available)"}'
if [ $(df -h | awk 'NR>1 {gsub(/%/,"",$5); if($5+0 > 80) print $5}' | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "  None - all filesystems below 80%"
fi

echo ""
echo "Swap usage check:"
SWAP_TOTAL=$(grep SwapTotal /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
SWAP_FREE=$(grep SwapFree /proc/meminfo | awk '{print $2}')
if [ "$SWAP_TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
    SWAP_USED=$((SWAP_TOTAL - SWAP_FREE))
    SWAP_PCT=$((SWAP_USED * 100 / SWAP_TOTAL))
    echo "  Swap: ${SWAP_PCT}% used"
    if [ "$SWAP_PCT" -gt 50 ]; then
        echo "  WARNING: High swap usage!"
    fi
else
    echo "  No swap configured"
fi

echo ""
echo "Z

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
# Comprehensive System Health Check Script

echo "=== SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK ==="
echo ""
echo "--- DISK USAGE ---"
df -h
echo ""
echo "--- MEMORY USAGE ---"
free -h
echo ""
echo "--- CPU LOAD ---"
uptime
cat /proc/loadavg
echo ""
echo "--- TOP PROCESSES BY MEMORY ---"
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -20
echo ""
echo "--- TOP PROCESSES BY CPU ---"
ps aux --sort=-%cpu | head -20
echo ""
echo "=== CHECK COMPLETE ==="
